kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Millpond goes with at least one of Cedric, Cooper, or Weaver.
If either Highrow goes with Edmund or Blacksmith goes with 10 coins (but not both), then either Carpenter goes with Beatrix or 9 coins goes with Wulfric (but not both).
Millpond goes with exactly one of Rowan, Potter, or 9 coins.
Cedric, Eastcheap, and Millpond go with 6 coins, 9 coins, and 11 coins, in some order.
Exactly two of these are true: Matilda goes with 7 coins; Cooper goes with 6 coins; Bridgegate goes with 11 coins.
Exactly one of (the members of the Clothiers' Guild and the artisan in Eastcheap) goes with (11 coins or 7 coins).
The artisan in Southgate's levy is higher than both Rowan and the Weaver.
Edmund's levy is immediately next to the Weaver.
Either Wulfric belongs to the Hill Ward or both members of the Clothiers' Guild belong to the Hill Ward (but not both).
Either Millpond goes with Matilda or Potter goes with 6 coins.
More members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the North Side than members of the Clothiers' Guild.
No one in the North Side goes with Blacksmith if and only if Blacksmith does not go with Beatrix.
7 coins goes with at least two of Matilda, Cooper, and Eastcheap.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Stillwater goes with at least one of Cody, Carp, or Trout.
If either Grayreach goes with Dale or Bass goes with 8 lb (but not both), then either Bluegill goes with Boone or 7 lb goes with Wade (but not both).
Stillwater goes with exactly one of Royce, Perch, or 7 lb.
Cody, Cedarmere, and Stillwater go with 4 lb, 7 lb, and 9 lb, in some order.
Exactly two of these are true: Esther goes with 5 lb; Carp goes with 4 lb; Birchpool goes with 9 lb.
Exactly one of (the members of the Sunfish Family and the angler at Cedarmere) goes with (5 lb or 9 lb).
The angler at Willowmere's weight is higher than both Royce and the angler who landed the Trout.
Dale's weight is immediately next to the angler who landed the Trout.
Either Wade belongs to the West Watershed or both members of the Sunfish Family belong to the West Watershed (but not both).
Either Stillwater goes with Esther or Perch goes with 4 lb.
More members of the Pike Family are in the Lowland Basin than members of the Sunfish Family.
No one in the Lowland Basin goes with Bass if and only if Bass does not go with Boone.
5 lb goes with at least two of Esther, Carp, and Cedarmere.
